scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:b" "npm run dev:a" "npm run open"
scripts.dev:a: cd services/service-a && SERVICE_B_URL=http://localhost:3001 SERVICE_C_URL=http://localhost:3002 npx ts-node src/server.ts
scripts.k8s:down: kind delete cluster --name platform-lab && docker image rm registry.k8s.io/metrics-server/metrics-server:v0.8.1 2>/dev/null; echo 'cluster deleted'
scripts.test:load:local: cd tests/load && k6 run src/index.ts --config src/config/local-test.json -e DEBUG=true
scripts.test:load:smoke: cd tests/load && k6 run src/index.ts --config src/config/smoke-test.json
scripts.test:load:regression: cd tests/load && k6 run src/index.ts --config src/config/regression-test.json
scripts.test:load:load: cd tests/load && k6 run src/index.ts --config src/config/load-test.json
scripts.test:load:stress: cd tests/load && k6 run src/index.ts --config src/config/stress-test.json
scripts.dashboard: cd docs/dashboard && python3 -m http.server 8080 & sleep 1 && open http://localhost:8080 && echo 'Dashboard at http://localhost:8080 — Ctrl+C to stop' && wait
